page_content:
### **Email Template: Dr. Moo-Yeal Lee**
*(The Efficient Professional)*  
Subject: Requesting a Graduate School Letter of Recommendation – [Your Name]  
Dear Dr. Lee,  
I hope you're doing well! I’m following up on my request for your graduate school letter of recommendation—this would be for [specific field], and I’d greatly appreciate your support as one of the most impactful instructors I’ve had in Biochemical Engineering (Fall 2023).  
As we discussed, I'd like to submit a draft version of the letter by [date] so you can review it quickly. Please let me know if there are any specific formatting preferences or content areas where you’d like me to highlight my work. Once approved, I’ll ensure the final version is submitted promptly via the application portal.  
I understand your preference for efficiency and clarity—so please feel free to provide feedback directly on the draft (or suggest a brief meeting if needed).  
Thank you again for being so responsive in the past; it made all the difference during my applications.  
Best regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Student ID/Program, if applicable]
[Contact Information]  
---
